title: test comment says Wednesday but 2024-03-17 is Sunday
description: utils.rs test_within_week_returns_weekday_and_time: comment says 'Wednesday, 2024-03-17' but 2024-03-17 is a Sunday. The assertion 'Sun 08:03' is correct; only the comment is wrong. Low blast radius but misleading — a reader verifying the oracle against calendar would find the comment contradicts the assertion.
